Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Void Sage]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The Void Sage is a presence that can manifest through Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's technique fuses with the authority of the Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Dross addresses Lindon as Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen is not a Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Void Sage may take over the labyrinth.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has authority as the Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — No one is going to tell the Void Sage what to do.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Void Sage is a title or authority held by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Void Sage has a way to take Yerin up so she can stab Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Void Sage said 'Consume'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Dreadgod gave up on keeping the Void Sage as a prize.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Void Sage is traveling to meet Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — A Void Sage was behind Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Void Sage is Wei Shi Lindon Arelius.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Wei Shi Kelsa is the sister of the Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — People wanted to borrow the protection of the Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — The Void Sage believes Reigan Shen’s Remnant was holding onto their inheritance.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa is the sister of the Void Sage.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
